news.title: JoulWatt Launches New Automotive-Grade DC-DC Converter Series
news.summary: JoulWatt announces the release of AEC-Q100 qualified synchronous buck converters designed for automotive infotainment and ADAS applications, featuring enhanced reliability and wide temperature range.
news.content:
JoulWatt Technology has expanded its automotive power management portfolio with the launch of a new series of AEC-Q100 qualified DC-DC converters. The new products are specifically designed to meet the stringent requirements of automotive applications including infotainment systems, advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS), and body electronics.

Key features of the new series include:

- AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification (-40°C to +105°C)
- Wide input voltage range: 4.5V to 40V
- Output currents up to 10A
- High efficiency up to 95%
- Comprehensive protection features including OVP, OCP, and thermal shutdown
- Compact packages for space-constrained applications

The new converters are available through authorized distributor BeiLuo Electronics, with full technical support and design resources provided.
news.author: JoulWatt Marketing Team

news.title: JoulWatt Expands AC-DC Portfolio with High-Power Flyback Controllers
news.summary: New quasi-resonant flyback controllers support up to 100W output power with active burst mode for high efficiency across all load conditions.
news.content:
JoulWatt has introduced new high-power AC-DC flyback controllers targeting adapter and auxiliary power supply applications. The JW1550 series features quasi-resonant operation with valley switching for reduced EMI and improved efficiency.

The controllers support:

- Output power up to 100W
- Quasi-resonant operation for high efficiency
- Active burst mode for light-load efficiency
- Integrated high-voltage startup
- Comprehensive protection features
- SOP-8 and DIP-8 package options

These products are ideal for laptop adapters, LED drivers, and industrial auxiliary power supplies.
news.author: JoulWatt Product Team

news.title: JoulWatt Achieves IATF 16949 Automotive Quality Certification
news.summary: JoulWatt receives IATF 16949 certification, reinforcing commitment to automotive quality standards and expanding opportunities in the automotive semiconductor market.
news.content:
JoulWatt Technology has successfully achieved IATF 16949:2016 certification, the international standard for quality management systems in the automotive industry. This certification demonstrates JoulWatt's commitment to meeting the highest quality standards required by automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers.

The certification covers:

- Design and development of power management ICs
- Manufacturing processes
- Quality management systems
- Continuous improvement programs

With this certification, JoulWatt is positioned to expand its presence in the growing automotive electronics market, particularly in electric vehicles, ADAS, and infotainment systems.
news.author: JoulWatt Quality Team

news.title: JoulWatt Introduces High-PSRR LDO Series for Noise-Sensitive Applications
news.summary: New JW5220 series LDO regulators deliver ultra-high PSRR up to 80dB at 1kHz, ideal for RF, audio, and precision analog applications.
news.content:
JoulWatt has launched the JW5220 series of high-PSRR (Power Supply Rejection Ratio) low-dropout regulators designed for noise-sensitive applications. These LDOs provide clean power supplies for RF circuits, audio amplifiers, and precision analog systems.

Key specifications:

- Ultra-high PSRR: 80dB at 1kHz, 60dB at 100kHz
- Low noise: 20μVrms (10Hz to 100kHz)
- Low dropout voltage: 250mV at 500mA
- Wide input voltage range: 2.5V to 5.5V
- Output current up to 500mA
- Multiple fixed output voltage options

The JW5220 series is available in SOT-23-5 and SOT-89-3 packages, with samples and evaluation boards available through BeiLuo Electronics.
news.author: JoulWatt Analog Team

news.title: JoulWatt and BeiLuo Electronics Expand Distribution Partnership
news.summary: Strategic partnership expansion brings enhanced technical support, faster delivery, and comprehensive design services for JoulWatt products in the Chinese market.
news.content:
JoulWatt Technology and BeiLuo Electronics have announced an expansion of their distribution partnership to better serve the growing demand for power management ICs in China. The enhanced partnership includes:

- Expanded inventory of JoulWatt's full product portfolio
- Dedicated FAE support team for technical assistance
- Joint design-in support for customer projects
- Faster delivery times with local warehousing
- Regular technical training and workshops

This partnership expansion reflects the strong market demand for high-quality, cost-effective power management solutions in industrial, automotive, and consumer electronics applications.
news.author: BeiLuo Electronics Marketing

news.title: JoulWatt Expands Gate Driver Family with 4A High-Speed Drivers
news.summary: New JW5352 and JW5353 gate drivers offer 4A source/sink current capability with fast propagation delay for high-frequency switching applications.
news.content:
JoulWatt has expanded its gate driver portfolio with the introduction of high-speed 4A MOSFET and IGBT gate drivers. The new devices are optimized for motor drives, power supplies, and inverter applications requiring fast switching speeds.

Product highlights:

- 4A peak source and sink current
- Fast propagation delay: 25ns typical
- Wide operating voltage range: 8V to 20V
- Under-voltage lockout with hysteresis
- Available in single and dual channel configurations
- Industry-standard pinouts for easy replacement

The new gate drivers complement JoulWatt's existing power management portfolio, providing complete solutions from AC-DC conversion to power switching.
news.author: JoulWatt Power Team
